query_0.question: Give me a short reel hook for this business
query_0.response_preview:
To create a short reel hook for Acme Co's automated SMS marketing service, I'd suggest the following:

"Get more members, grow your gym! Our automated SMS marketing solution helps you stay connected with customers and drive membership sales. Join the movement and boost your fitness studio's growth today!"

This 6-second hook aims to capture attention by highlighting the key benefit of using Acme C

campaign.script: Up your gym game with Acme Co! We help local gyms grow memberships with automated SMS marketing. DM us to book a free strategy call and take your business to the next level!
campaign.caption: Grow Your Gym's Membership with Automated SMS Marketing
image_prompts: A photo of a bustling gym with happy members working out
An image of a person holding a smartphone with the Acme Co logo on the screen
A graphic illustrating the benefits of automated SMS marketing for gyms
shot_list: Intro: Establishing shot of the gym
Problem agitation: Showing a problem, e.g. a member struggling to stay motivated
Solution introduction: Introducing Acme Co and our solution
Benefits: Highlighting the benefits of automated SMS marketing for gyms
Call-to-action: Encouraging viewers to DM us to book a free strategy call
campaign.cta: DM us to book a free strategy call
